title: Bible Stories for Kids
author: Sarah Johnson
description: A simple retelling of classic Bible stories for young children.

chapters.title: Creation
chapters.content: In the beginning, God created the world... in a way kids understand!

chapters.title: Noah’s Ark
chapters.content: God told Noah to build a big boat and save the animals...

chapters.title: David and Goliath
chapters.content: David was small, but with God's help he defeated a giant!

title: Brave Heroes of the Bible
author: Mark Daniels
description: Stories of brave men and women who trusted God.

chapters.title: Esther Saves Her People
chapters.content: Queen Esther used courage to protect her people...

chapters.title: Daniel in the Lions’ Den
chapters.content: Daniel trusted God even when he was thrown into a den of lions...

title: Teen Devotional Guide
author: Emma Grace
description: Daily devotionals for teenagers facing real-life challenges.

chapters.title: Identity in Christ
chapters.content: Teenagers often struggle with identity; this chapter explores who you really are in Christ...

chapters.title: Overcoming Peer Pressure
chapters.content: How to make bold choices and stand for God in school...

chapters.title: Handling Stress
chapters.content: God gives peace even in exams, pressure, and confusion...

title: The Fruit of the Spirit for Kids
author: Linda Scott
description: Teaching kids about love, joy, peace, patience, and kindness.

chapters.title: Love
chapters.content: Love means being kind and caring just like Jesus...

chapters.title: Joy
chapters.content: Joy is more than happiness; it is a gift from God...

title: Teen Prayer Starter Pack
author: James Cole
description: A guide for teens learning how to pray with confidence.

chapters.title: How to Pray
chapters.content: Prayer is talking to God; here’s how to start...

chapters.title: Praying for Friends
chapters.content: A teen-friendly guide on how to pray for classmates and friends...
